verdicts.note: The score rests on one pamphlet sentence ('safer neighborhoods where laws are enforced and criminals are apprehended'). Direction is clear and a WACOPS endorsement on S2 corroborates it, but -2 (fully pole_a: staffing, mandatory treatment, clearing encampments) leans on the absence of a prevention plank in a three-issue pamphlet statement. -1 medium is what the evidence carries.
